'''nongajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:mealable|mealable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mealable|mealable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nongajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nongajithi|nongajithi]] || [[word:nongajiji|nongajiji]] || [[word:nongajishi|nongajishi]] || [[word:nongajiki|nongajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nongajuthuthu|nongajuthuthu]] || [[word:nongajujuju|nongajujuju]] || [[word:nongajushushu|nongajushushu]] || [[word:nongajukuku|nongajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nongajuthu|nongajuthu]] || [[word:nongajuju|nongajuju]] || [[word:nongajushu|nongajushu]] || [[word:nongajuku|nongajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nongajufthuf|nongajufthuf]] || [[word:nongajufjuf|nongajufjuf]] || [[word:nongajufshuf|nongajufshuf]] || [[word:nongajufkuf|nongajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nongajethe|nongajethe]] || [[word:nongajeje|nongajeje]] || [[word:nongajeshe|nongajeshe]] || [[word:nongajeke|nongajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nongajothotho|nongajothotho]] || [[word:nongajojojo|nongajojojo]] || [[word:nongajoshosho|nongajoshosho]] || [[word:nongajokoko|nongajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nongajotho|nongajotho]] || [[word:nongajojo|nongajojo]] || [[word:nongajosho|nongajosho]] || [[word:nongajoko|nongajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nongajofthof|nongajofthof]] || [[word:nongajofjof|nongajofjof]] || [[word:nongajofshof|nongajofshof]] || [[word:nongajofkof|nongajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nongajïfthïf|nongajïfthïf]] || [[word:nongajïfjïf|nongajïfjïf]] || [[word:nongajïfshïf|nongajïfshïf]] || [[word:nongajïfkïf|nongajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nongajïfthïfthïf|nongajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:nongajïfjïfjïf|nongajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:nongajïfshïfshïf|nongajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:nongajïfkïfkïf|nongajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nongajïfthïf|nongajïfthïf]] || [[word:nongajïfjïf|nongajïfjïf]] || [[word:nongajïfshïf|nongajïfshïf]] || [[word:nongajïfkïf|nongajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nongajïfthïf|nongajïfthïf]] || [[word:nongajïfjïf|nongajïfjïf]] || [[word:nongajïfshïf|nongajïfshïf]] || [[word:nongajïfkïf|nongajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nongajæthæ|nongajæthæ]] || [[word:nongajæjæ|nongajæjæ]] || [[word:nongajæshæ|nongajæshæ]] || [[word:nongajækæ|nongajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nongajathatha|nongajathatha]] || [[word:nongajajaja|nongajajaja]] || [[word:nongajashasha|nongajashasha]] || [[word:nongajakaka|nongajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nongajatha|nongajatha]] || [[word:nongajaja|nongajaja]] || [[word:nongajasha|nongajasha]] || [[word:nongajaka|nongajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nongajafthaf|nongajafthaf]] || [[word:nongajafjaf|nongajafjaf]] || [[word:nongajafshaf|nongajafshaf]] || [[word:nongajafkaf|nongajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nongajasha|nongajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nongajshësha|nongajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nongajrosha|nongajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nongajmusha|nongajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nongajyasha|nongajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonongajnkshësha|gonongajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonongajnkrosha|gonongajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonongajnkmusha|gonongajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonongajnkyasha|gonongajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nongangajasha|nongangajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nongangajshësha|nongangajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nongangajrosha|nongangajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nongangajmusha|nongangajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nongangajyasha|nongangajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonongangajnkshësha|gonongangajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonongangajnkrosha|gonongangajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonongangajnkmusha|gonongangajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonongangajnkyasha|gonongangajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nengæjasha|nengæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nengæjshësha|nengæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nengæjrosha|nengæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nengæjmusha|nengæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nengæjyasha|nengæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonengæjnkshësha|gonengæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonengæjnkrosha|gonengæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonengæjnkmusha|gonengæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonengæjnkyasha|gonengæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nongfajasha|nongfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nongfajshësha|nongfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nongfajrosha|nongfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nongfajmusha|nongfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nongfajyasha|nongfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonongfajnkshësha|gonongfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonongfajnkrosha|gonongfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonongfajnkmusha|gonongfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonongfajnkyasha|gonongfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
